name: Magical Archer
description: n the game &ldquo;Magical Archer,&rdquo; you will enter an enchanting fantasy world where you take on the role of a magical archer with the task of collecting a collection of magical bottles. These bottles contain various spells and enchantments. Gameplay: The game consists of 16 levels, each of which presents a challenge to your archery skills. At the beginning of each level, you stand in front of a glass that needs to be shattered. To do this, you must set the angle and strength of your shot so that the arrow precisely hits the target.
